stage.subtitle_ar: هنا تتعلم لغة الورشة اليومية: أسماء الأدوات والمعدّات، ووصف الأعطال، وشرح خطوات الصيانة بالإنجليزية.

content.intro_ar: الورشة هي قلب عملك، وكل أداة فيها لها اسم بالإنجليزية يسمعه الفنيون والمورّدون كل يوم. في هذا الدرس ستتعلم أسماء الأدوات والمعدّات الأساسية حتى تطلبها وتتحدث عنها بثقة. تخيّل أنك تمشي في ورشتك وتسمّي كل ما تراه بالإنجليزية.

vocab.meaning_en: a thing you use to do work with your hands
vocab.example: A mechanic needs good tools.

vocab.meaning_en: the machines and things you need for a job
vocab.example: The new equipment is in the workshop.

vocab.meaning_en: a tool that turns bolts and nuts
vocab.example: Use the wrench to open this bolt.

vocab.meaning_en: a tool that turns screws
vocab.example: I need a small screwdriver.

vocab.meaning_en: a tool that holds and pulls small things
vocab.example: Hold the wire with the pliers.

vocab.meaning_en: a tool that lifts one side of a car
vocab.example: Put the jack under the car.

vocab.meaning_en: a big machine that raises the whole car
vocab.example: The car is on the lift now.

vocab.meaning_en: a box where you keep your tools
vocab.example: Put the wrench back in the toolbox.

vocab.meaning_en: a tool that makes holes
vocab.example: The drill is very fast.

vocab.meaning_en: clothes for your hands
vocab.example: Wear gloves to keep your hands safe.

paragraphs: Saad opens his workshop in the industrial area at eight in the morning. First, he checks the equipment. The lift is very important, because his team puts cars on it all day. A good lift keeps the workers safe.

Next, Saad looks at the tools. Every worker has a toolbox with a wrench, a screwdriver, and pliers. There is also a big drill and a jack for cars on the ground. When a tool is old or broken, Saad buys a new one. Good tools save time and money.

Safety is also part of the job. All workers wear gloves, and they put every tool back in the toolbox at the end of the day. Last month, Saad paid 900 riyals for new tools. He says, 'My equipment is my business. When I take care of it, it takes care of me.'

key_phrases.en: Put the car on the lift.
The tools go back in the toolbox at the end of the day.
key_phrases.ar: تعود الأدوات إلى صندوق العدة في نهاية اليوم.

key_phrases.en: We need to buy new equipment for the workshop.
key_phrases.ar: نحتاج إلى شراء معدّات جديدة للورشة.

key_phrases.en: Always wear gloves when you work.

comprehension.question: What does Saad check first in the morning?
comprehension.explanation_ar: أول شيء يفعله سعد في الصباح هو فحص المعدّات، وخاصة الرافعة.

comprehension.question: Why is the lift important?
comprehension.explanation_ar: الرافعة الجيدة تحافظ على سلامة العمّال أثناء العمل تحت السيارات.

comprehension.question: What is inside every worker's toolbox?
options: A wrench, a screwdriver, and pliers
comprehension.correct: A wrench, a screwdriver, and pliers
comprehension.explanation_ar: كل عامل لديه صندوق عدة فيه مفتاح ربط ومفكّ وكمّاشة.

comprehension.question: What do the workers wear for safety?
comprehension.explanation_ar: يلبس العمّال القفازات لحماية أيديهم أثناء العمل.

comprehension.question: How much did Saad pay for new tools last month?
comprehension.explanation_ar: دفع سعد ٩٠٠ ريال ثمنًا للأدوات الجديدة الشهر الماضي.

task.prompt_en: Write 3–4 sentences about the tools and equipment in your workshop.
task.prompt_ar: اكتب ٣–٤ جُمل عن الأدوات والمعدّات في ورشتك.
task.guidance_ar: استخدم ٣ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس، مثل: wrench وtoolbox وequipment.

content.intro_ar: العميل يصف العطل بكلمات بسيطة: صوت غريب، تسريب، لمبة تحذير. عندما تفهم هذه الكلمات بالإنجليزية وتستخدمها بنفسك، تكسب ثقة عملائك ومورّديك. في هذا الدرس ستتعلم كيف تصف مشاكل السيارة وتسأل عنها بوضوح.

vocab.meaning_en: something that is wrong
vocab.example: My car has a problem.

vocab.meaning_en: a sound that you do not want to hear
vocab.example: I hear a noise from the engine.

vocab.meaning_en: when liquid comes out slowly
vocab.example: There is an oil leak under the car.

vocab.meaning_en: the part that stops the car
vocab.example: The brakes are old.

vocab.meaning_en: the part that gives the car electric power
vocab.example: The battery is weak in the morning.

vocab.meaning_en: gray or black air that comes from fire or heat
vocab.example: Smoke is coming from the engine.

vocab.meaning_en: something you feel with your nose
vocab.example: There is a strange smell in the car.

vocab.meaning_en: a small light that shows a problem
vocab.example: The warning light is on.

vocab.meaning_en: a tire without air
vocab.example: He stopped because of a flat tire.

vocab.meaning_en: to become too hot
vocab.example: The engine can overheat in summer.

paragraphs: A car cannot talk, but it can tell you about a problem. Good mechanics listen, look, and smell. A strange noise from the engine, smoke from the front, or a bad smell — these are all signs.

On Monday, a customer came to Fahad's workshop. He said, 'There is a warning light on, and I hear a noise when I stop.' Fahad checked the car. The brakes were old, and there was a small oil leak under the engine. He said, 'Do not worry. We can fix it today.'

Some problems are easy, like a flat tire or a weak battery. Other problems are big. When an engine starts to overheat, the driver must stop quickly. Fahad always tells his customers: 'When you see or hear something new, come to the workshop. A small problem today is cheaper than a big problem next month.'

key_phrases.en: What is the problem with the car?
I hear a strange noise from the engine.
There is an oil leak under the car.
Let me check it for you.
Do not worry, we can fix it today.

comprehension.question: How can a car 'tell' you about a problem?
comprehension.explanation_ar: السيارة «تخبرك» بالمشكلة عن طريق الأصوات الغريبة والدخان والروائح.

comprehension.question: What did the customer hear when he stopped the car?
comprehension.explanation_ar: قال العميل إنه يسمع صوتًا عند التوقف، وكانت الفرامل قديمة.

comprehension.question: What did Fahad find under the engine?
comprehension.explanation_ar: وجد فهد تسريب زيت صغيرًا تحت المحرك.

comprehension.question: What must a driver do when the engine starts to overheat?
comprehension.explanation_ar: عندما يبدأ المحرك في السخونة الزائدة، يجب على السائق التوقف بسرعة.

comprehension.question: Why should a customer come to the workshop with a small problem?
options: It is cheaper than a big problem later
The customer gets a free car
comprehension.correct: It is cheaper than a big problem later
comprehension.explanation_ar: إصلاح المشكلة الصغيرة اليوم أرخص من إصلاح مشكلة كبيرة بعد شهر.

task.prompt_en: A customer's car has a problem. Describe two problems, for example a noise and a warning light. Speak for 30 seconds.
task.prompt_ar: سيارة أحد العملاء فيها عطل. صِف مشكلتين، مثل صوت غريب ولمبة تحذير. تحدّث لمدة ٣٠ ثانية.
task.guidance_ar: ابدأ بجملة: The car has a problem... واستخدم كلمات مثل noise وleak وwarning light.

content.intro_ar: الصيانة الدورية هي أساس سمعة الورشة الجيدة. في هذا الدرس ستتعلم كيف تشرح خطوات الصيانة بالإنجليزية خطوة بخطوة: تغيير الزيت، فحص ضغط الإطارات، وجولة الاختبار. اشرح الخطوات لعميلك بالإنجليزية وسيشعر أن سيارته في أيدٍ أمينة.

vocab.meaning_en: the work that keeps a car in good condition
vocab.example: Regular maintenance saves money.

vocab.meaning_en: a full check and small repairs for a car
vocab.example: Your car needs a service.

vocab.meaning_en: one part of a plan or a job
vocab.example: The first step is the oil change.

vocab.meaning_en: putting new oil in the engine
vocab.example: An oil change takes thirty minutes.

vocab.meaning_en: a part that cleans oil or air
vocab.example: We put in a new oil filter.

vocab.meaning_en: the liquid that keeps the engine cool
vocab.example: Check the coolant before a long trip.

vocab.meaning_en: the amount of air in a tire
vocab.example: Low tire pressure is not safe.

vocab.meaning_en: to take an old thing out and put a new thing in
vocab.example: We replace the old filter.

vocab.meaning_en: to make something firm and strong
vocab.example: Tighten the bolts well.

vocab.meaning_en: to look at something carefully
vocab.example: The mechanic inspects the brakes.

vocab.meaning_en: a short drive to check the car
vocab.example: We take every car for a test drive.

reading.title_en: Five Steps for a Good Service
paragraphs: Regular maintenance keeps a car strong for many years. In Omar's workshop, every service follows five clear steps. The team writes each step on a card, so no one forgets anything.

First, the mechanic does the oil change and puts in a new oil filter. Second, he checks the coolant and adds more when it is low. Third, he checks the tire pressure on all four tires. Fourth, he inspects the brakes and tightens any loose parts. When a part is too old, he replaces it. Finally, he takes the car for a short test drive around the industrial area.

After the test drive, Omar looks at the card and signs it. Then the customer pays — a full service costs 350 riyals. Omar tells every customer: 'Come back after 10,000 kilometers. A car with regular maintenance saves you money.'

key_phrases.en: First, we change the oil and the filter.
Then we check the tire pressure.
We replace the old part with a new one.
Finally, we take the car for a test drive.
key_phrases.ar: أخيرًا، نأخذ السيارة في جولة اختبار.

key_phrases.en: Your car needs a service every 10,000 kilometers.
key_phrases.ar: تحتاج سيارتك إلى صيانة كل ١٠٬٠٠٠ كيلومتر.

comprehension.question: What is the first step in Omar's service?
comprehension.explanation_ar: الخطوة الأولى في الصيانة هي تغيير الزيت ووضع فلتر زيت جديد.

comprehension.question: When does the mechanic add coolant?
comprehension.explanation_ar: يضيف الفني سائل التبريد عندما يكون مستواه منخفضًا.

comprehension.question: How many tires does the mechanic check?
comprehension.explanation_ar: يفحص الفني ضغط الإطارات في الإطارات الأربعة كلها.

comprehension.question: What is the last step of the service?
comprehension.explanation_ar: آخر خطوة هي جولة اختبار قصيرة حول الحي الصناعي.

comprehension.question: How much does a full service cost in Omar's workshop?
comprehension.explanation_ar: الصيانة الكاملة في ورشة عمر تكلّف ٣٥٠ ريالًا.

task.prompt_en: Write the steps of a simple service in your workshop. Use First, Then, and Finally.
task.prompt_ar: اكتب خطوات صيانة بسيطة في ورشتك. استخدم First وThen وFinally.
task.guidance_ar: اكتب ٤ جُمل قصيرة على الأقل، واستخدم كلمات الدرس مثل oil change وtire pressure وtest drive.
